description: Convert the following Java files to Kotlin: app/src/main/java/com/example/roomwordsample/Word.java, app/src/main/java/com/example/roomwordsample/WordDao.java, and app/src/main/java/com/example/roomwordsample/WordViewModel.java. Ensure the resulting Kotlin files preserve Room annotations, resolve any nullability issues, and that the project builds successfully. Do not convert other Java files in the project.
